title: Strip WebSocket/SSE connection limits, delegate to reverse proxy
description: If streaming.rs has per-user connection counting or subscription limits, strip them. Caddy's max_conns and nginx's limit_conn_zone handle this at the infrastructure layer, surviving restarts and covering all endpoints. Replace with ponytail comment. Reference: gaja commit 3cf3634.
close_reason: No connection limits existed to strip; ponytail comment added documenting delegation
